org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.query.CriteriaDefinition

Package
Description
org.springframework.data.cassandra.core
Apache Cassandra core support.
org.springframework.data.cassandra.core.query
Apache Cassandra specific query and update support.

    class

    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    Filter
    Filter consisting of CriteriaDefinitions to be used with SELECT, UPDATE and DELETE queries.

    Create a criterion using the CONTAINS operator.
    CriteriaDefinition

    Create a criterion using the CONTAINS KEY operator.
    CriteriaDefinition
    Criteria.gt(Object value)
    Create a criterion using the < operator.
    CriteriaDefinition
    Criteria.gte(Object value)
    Create a criterion using the <= operator.
    CriteriaDefinition
    Criteria.in(@Nullable Object... values)
    Create a criterion using the IN operator.
    CriteriaDefinition
    Criteria.in(Collection<?> values)
    Create a criterion using the IN operator.
    CriteriaDefinition
    Criteria.is(@Nullable Object value)
    Create a criterion using equality.
    CriteriaDefinition
    Criteria.isNotNull()
    Create a criterion using the IS NOT NULL operator.
    CriteriaDefinition
    Criteria.like(Object value)
    Create a criterion using the LIKE operator.
    CriteriaDefinition
    Criteria.lt(Object value)
    Create a criterion using the > operator.
    CriteriaDefinition
    Criteria.lte(Object value)
    Create a criterion using the >= operator.
    CriteriaDefinition
    Criteria.ne(@Nullable Object value)
    Create a criterion using the != operator.
